main.name: Heroes in a Half Shell
main.oracle_text:
Vigilance, menace, trample, haste
Whenever one or more Mutants, Ninjas, and/or Turtles you control deal combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each of those creatures and draw a card.
main.flavor_text: They're the world's most fearsome fighting team!

card.name: Farseek
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Plains, Island, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "How truly vast this city must be, that I have traveled so far and seen so much, yet never once found the place where the buildings fail."

card.name: Morphic Pool
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {U} or {B}.
card.flavor_text: Ancient magic reshapes the stage into a variety of landscapes.

card.name: Sea of Clouds
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
card.flavor_text: Skybridges from across Kylem converge at the grand stadium of Valor's Reach.

card.name: Zagoth Triome
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {B}, {G}, or {U}.)
This land enters tapped.
Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)
card.flavor_text: Hunters in the primeval wetlands become fluent in reading the ripples to tell when to pursue and when to flee.

card.name: Rejuvenating Springs
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Undergrowth Stadium
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Vault of Champions
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Luxury Suite
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Bountiful Promenade
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Inspiring Call
card.oracle_text: Draw a card for each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it. Those creatures gain indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy them.)
card.flavor_text: "Now is the hour. Ours is the duty. For victory and family—charge!"

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Spire Garden
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.
card.flavor_text: The village's name was long forgotten, its crumbling ruins a monument to the fragility of civilization.

card.name: Spectator Seating
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {R} or {W}.
card.flavor_text:
"It's almost as exciting as watching a great battle from the Blood Age in person!"
—Quintorius, Lorehold mage-student

card.name: Training Center
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.
card.flavor_text:
"Sometimes you just need to be inspired by a massive explosion or a color that didn't exist five seconds ago."
—Rootha, Prismari mage-student

card.name: Rhythm of the Wild
card.oracle_text:
Creature spells you control can't be countered.
Nontoken creatures you control have riot. (They enter with your choice of a +1/+1 counter or haste.)
card.flavor_text: Some view Domri's unlikely ascent as a sign of Ilharg the Raze-Boar's imminent return.

card.name: Evolution Witness
card.oracle_text:
{1}{G}: Adapt 2. (If this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put two +1/+1 counters on it.)
Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on this creature, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.
card.flavor_text: She remembers every breakthrough, from the gene's mutation to the new life's propagation.

card.name: Hardened Scales
card.oracle_text: If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.
card.flavor_text:
"When it starts, I won't be myself any more. I won't be able to hold myself back."
—Jecht

card.name: Sacred Foundry
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {R} or {W}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"Log 2.2.119: Kiln, known for its blazing forges and ancient lava seeps. The footing may be treacherous, but the metallurgy is grand!"
—*Maisie's Edge Chronicles*

card.name: Stomping Ground
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {R} or {G}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"Log 2.5.325: A newborn moon, Aqqat still churns with the fires of creation. I'm eager to see what it will become!"
—*Maisie's Edge Chronicles*

card.name: Watery Grave
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"Log 2.9.089: Lammuat, the cemetery moon of salvage and secrets. Could be profitable for those brave enough to plumb its recesses."
—*Maisie's Edge Chronicles*

card.name: Godless Shrine
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {W} or {B}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"Log 1.7.618: Starshadow, a relic of a culture lost to calamity. Its people were eradicated in a single day—but by what?"
—*Maisie's Edge Chronicles*

card.name: Breeding Pool
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"Log 1.4.778: Granove, a tropical moon teeming with endemic biota. A must see for any aspiring astrobiologist!"
—*Maisie's Edge Chronicles*

card.name: Steam Vents
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {R}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text: The flamekin was drawn toward warm laughter when the skies darkened, then she turned back to the lonely peak.

card.name: Hallowed Fountain
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {W} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text: The merrow was vending her wares when the skies darkened, then she sharply raised her prices.

card.name: Temple Garden
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G} or {W}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text: The kithkin was admiring the flowers when the skies darkened, then they ripped up the roots for the next season.

card.name: Overgrown Tomb
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {B} or {G}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text: The elf was disgusted by the bramble before him when the skies darkened, then he stepped closer to observe the wild beauty.

card.name: Blood Crypt
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {B} or {R}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text: The boggart was playfully prodding a critter when the skies darkened, then he gobbled it down with glee.

card.name: Turtles Forever
card.oracle_text: Search your library and/or outside the game for exactly four legendary creature cards you own with different names, then reveal those cards. An opponent chooses two of them. Put the chosen cards into your hand and shuffle the rest into your library.
card.flavor_text:
"See you around the multiverse, bros."
—One Leonardo or another

card.name: Michelangelo, On the Scene
card.oracle_text:
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player it's attacking.)
Michelangelo enters with a +1/+1 counter on him for each land you control.
When Michelangelo dies, return this card to your hand.

card.name: Leonardo, the Balance
card.oracle_text:
Whenever a token you control enters, you may put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Do this only once each turn.
{W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Creatures you control gain menace, trample, and lifelink until end of turn.
Partner—Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material
card.name: Doubling Season
card.oracle_text:
If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.
If an effect would put one or more counters on a permanent you control, it puts twice that many of those counters on that permanent instead.

card.name: Leader's Talent
card.oracle_text:
(Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.)
Whenever you attack, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature.
{2}{W}: Level 2
Whenever a creature you control leaves the battlefield, if it had a counter on it, you gain 2 life.
{3}{W}: Level 3
Whenever you cast a spell, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Dark Leo & Shredder
card.type_line: Legendary Creature — Mutant Ninja Turtle Human

card.name: Michelangelo, Improviser
card.oracle_text:
Sneak {2}{G}{G} (You may cast this spell for {2}{G}{G} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.)
Whenever Michelangelo deals combat damage to a player, you may put a creature card and/or a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Raph & Leo, Sibling Rivals
card.oracle_text: Whenever Raph & Leo attack, if it's the first combat phase of the turn, untap one or two target attacking creatures. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.
card.flavor_text: At odds as brothers, perfectly in sync as fighters.

card.name: Raphael, the Nightwatcher
card.oracle_text:
Sneak {1}{R}{R} (You may cast this spell for {1}{R}{R} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.)
Attacking creatures you control have double strike.
card.flavor_text: "Time to punch in."

card.name: Mutagen Man, Living Ooze
card.oracle_text:
Trample
Activated abilities of artifact tokens you control cost {1} less to activate.
When Mutagen Man enters, create X Mutagen tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers
card.oracle_text:
Trample, haste
Whenever Raph & Mikey attack, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card onto the battlefield tapped and attacking and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Turtle Power!
card.oracle_text:
Flash
Turtles you control get +2/+2.
card.flavor_text: Unnoticed by the crowd, the strange canister bounced several more times, striking and smashing a glass jar which held four small turtles . . .

card.name: Turtle Van
card.oracle_text:
Whenever this Vehicle attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature that crewed it this turn. Then if that creature is a Mutant, Ninja, or Turtle, double the number of +1/+1 counters on it.
Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Baxter, Fly in the Ointment
card.oracle_text:
Whenever Baxter enters or attacks, each creature you control with a counter on it gains flying until end of turn.
Whenever you draw a card, put a +1/+1 counter on Baxter.
card.flavor_text: "What am I? I am nothing anymore! A FREAK! I'll never be taken seriously as a scientist again!"

card.name: Shredder, Shadow Master
card.oracle_text:
Whenever Shredder attacks a player, for each other opponent, create a token that's a copy of Shredder tapped and attacking that player, except it isn't legendary. Sacrifice those tokens at end of combat.
Whenever Shredder deals combat damage to a player, that player loses half their life, rounded up.

card.name: Game Over
card.oracle_text:
This spell costs {2} less to cast if a player's life total is less than or equal to half their starting life total.
Destroy all creatures.
card.flavor_text:
"I've beaten this turtle already. This is no test."
—Karai

card.name: Leatherhead, Iron Gator
card.oracle_text:
Trample, haste
Whenever Leatherhead attacks, put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control.
card.flavor_text: She's a thousand pounds of punishing reptile muscle, with the bite to back it up.

card.name: Ninja Pizza
card.oracle_text:
Foods you control have "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color."
At the beginning of your second main phase, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
card.flavor_text: The pizza that vanishes quickly without a trace.

card.name: High Score
card.oracle_text:
If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.
At the beginning of your end step, draw a card if you control a creature with the greatest power among creatures on the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: Victory comes in endless forms.

card.name: Level Up
card.oracle_text:
Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, put a +1/+1 counter on enchanted creature.
Enchanted creature has "Whenever this creature attacks, double the number of +1/+1 counters on it. Then if it has power 10 or greater, draw a card."

card.name: Arcade Cabinet
card.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to four target creatures.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice a token: Double the number of each kind of counter on target creature.
card.flavor_text: From the golden age of gaming . . .

card.name: Continue?
card.oracle_text: Choose up to four target creature cards in your graveyard that were put there from the battlefield this turn. Return them to the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: "You've gotta give it your all because anything less won't get the job done."

card.name: Endless Foot Assault
card.oracle_text:
Squad {1}{W} (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may pay {1}{W} any number of times. When this enchantment enters, create that many tokens that are copies of it.)
Whenever you attack, for each opponent, create a 1/1 black Ninja creature token that's tapped and attacking that player.

card.name: Ray Fillet, Wave Warrior
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Evolve (Whenever a creature you control enters, if that creature has greater power or toughness than this creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.)
Whenever a creature you control with a counter on it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Irma, Part-Time Mutant
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, Irma becomes a copy of up to one other target creature you control, except her name is Irma, Part-Time Mutant and she has this ability. Then put a +1/+1 counter on her.
card.flavor_text: "I'm not trying to cause trouble. Trouble just follows me around."

card.name: Fast Forward
card.oracle_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each opponent you attacked this turn.
Goad all creatures your opponents control. (Until your next turn, those creatures attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.)
card.flavor_text: The streets are a dangerous place for a pair of neon nightriders.

card.name: Dimension X Pizzasaur
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. When you do, destroy up to one target creature with mana value less than or equal to the number of counters among permanents you control.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life and each opponent loses 3 life.

card.name: April O'Neil, Live on the Scene
card.oracle_text:
Whenever a Mutant, Ninja, or Turtle you control enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
Partner—Character select
card.flavor_text: "This is great! I must really be onto something hot if they're trying to kill me!"

card.name: Bebop, Skull & Crossbones
card.oracle_text:
Partner with Rocksteady, Mutant Marauder (When this creature enters, target player may put Rocksteady into their hand from their library, then shuffle.)
Deathtouch
Whenever Bebop deals combat damage to a player, you may draw X cards, where X is the number of counters on Bebop. If you do, you lose X life.

card.name: Rocksteady, Mutant Marauder
card.oracle_text:
Partner with Bebop, Skull & Crossbones (When this creature enters, target player may put Bebop into their hand from their library, then shuffle.)
Trample
Whenever another nontoken creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Hidden Hideout
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
{2}, {T}: Target creature you control with a counter on it gains lifelink until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: Between ninjas, mutants, and alien bases, the subterranean housing market is shockingly competitive.

card.name: Coin of Mastery
card.oracle_text:
Each creature you control enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it for each mana from an artifact source spent to cast it.
{T}: Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
card.flavor_text: Nowhere else can one coin buy you a second chance.

card.name: Super Combo
card.oracle_text:
Replicate {2} (When you cast this spell, copy it for each time you paid its replicate cost. You may choose new targets for the copies.)
Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.
card.flavor_text: "Just gotta hit 'em harder than they hit you!"

card.name: Lita, Little Orphan Amphibian
card.oracle_text:
Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on Lita.
• Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
• Scry 1.

card.name: Mona Lisa, Science Geek
card.oracle_text:
Reach
{T}: Add X mana of any one color, where X is Mona Lisa's power.
card.flavor_text: "I felt kind of excited about being mutated, you know? I was getting to have this once in a lifetime experience! Maybe I could even base my thesis on it . . ."

card.name: Here Comes a New Hero!
card.oracle_text: Target player draws X cards. Create a token that's a copy of up to one target creature with mana value X or less.
card.flavor_text: "Give me a recap. Are we winning or losing?"

card.name: Lessons from Life
card.oracle_text: Draw three cards. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"Everyone's got their own strengths, Lita. You never know what cards they might play. Instead, focus on what you know and never doubt your choices."
—Michelangelo

card.name: Swift Demise
card.oracle_text: Swift Demise deals 1 damage to target creature. Then destroy each creature you don't control that was dealt damage this turn.
card.flavor_text: "My patience wears thin!"

card_faces.name: Double Jump
card_faces.oracle_text:
Put a flying counter on target creature you control. Until end of turn, it has base power and toughness 5/5.
Fuse (You may cast one or both halves of this card from your hand.)

card_faces.name: Flying Kick
card_faces.oracle_text:
Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.
Fuse (You may cast one or both halves of this card from your hand.)

card.name: Turtle Lair
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a Ninja or Turtle spell.
{3}, {T}: Target Ninja or Turtle can't be blocked this turn.
card.flavor_text: Home is where your pizza delivers.

card.name: Special Move
card.oracle_text:
Choose two —
• Jump Kick — Destroy target artifact.
• Dash Attack — Put two +1/+1 counters on target attacking or blocking creature you control.
• Foot Toss — Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to any other target. Then sacrifice it.

card.name: Together Forever
card.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, support 2. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.)
{1}: Choose target creature with a counter on it. When that creature dies this turn, return that card to its owner's hand.
card.flavor_text: One lean, mean, green, incredible team.

card.name: Vanquish the Horde
card.oracle_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield.
Destroy all creatures.
card.flavor_text:
"Ninja master, meet derby queen!"
—April O'Neil

card.name: Cultivate
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"One need not always find peace on the sword's edge, my son. One can find peace as readily in helping things grow."
—Splinter

card.name: Wave Goodbye
card.oracle_text: Return each creature without a +1/+1 counter on it to its owner's hand.
card.flavor_text:
"Thanks to its increased density, water flowing at just seven miles per hour carries the same kinetic energy as an F5 tornado . . . which is to say: Hold on tight, guys!"
—Donatello

card.name: Blasphemous Act
card.oracle_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield.
Blasphemous Act deals 13 damage to each creature.
card.flavor_text: It was a blunt metaphor: No legacies. No past. From here, the Turtles must choose to live in the present. Or not at all.

card.name: Shellshock
card.oracle_text: For each opponent, choose up to one target creature that player controls. Shellshock deals X damage to each of those creatures. You create a Mutagen token for each creature dealt damage this way. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Assassin's Trophy
card.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent an opponent controls. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Who are these . . . freaks? How do they know to fight like that? Answer me, or hang here until you die."

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: The power to draw on the wisdom of your allies at any time, from any place . . . or trade cat pics!

card.name: Chromatic Lantern
card.oracle_text:
Lands you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: The Time Scepter can not only control time, but bend reality itself. Its master could rule all of reality, rewriting history to suit their whims.

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text: Antonio's accommodated every request, asked no questions, and stayed open late. Truly a light in the darkness.

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: Back in the '80s, Channel 6 built their headquarters at the corner of Spectacle and Scandal.

card.name: Exotic Orchard
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
card.flavor_text:
"Yooo, Rock, check that out. A *mutant* music club?"
—Bebop

card.name: Fabled Passage
card.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control four or more lands, untap that land.

If damage would be dealt to another creature you control, prevent that damage. Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature for each 1 damage prevented this way.

tokens.oracle_text:
Trample
Activated abilities of artifact tokens you control cost {1} less to activate.
When Mutagen Man enters, create X Mutagen tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

tokens.name: Ninja Pizza
tokens.oracle_text:
Foods you control have "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color."
At the beginning of your second main phase, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

tokens.name: Raphael, the Muscle
tokens.oracle_text:
Double all damage that creatures you control with counters on them would deal.
When Raphael enters, create a Mutagen token.
Partner—Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

tokens.name: Rocksteady, Mutant Marauder
tokens.oracle_text:
Partner with Bebop, Skull & Crossbones (When this creature enters, target player may put Bebop into their hand from their library, then shuffle.)
Trample
Whenever another nontoken creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

tokens.name: Shredder, Shadow Master
tokens.oracle_text:
Whenever Shredder attacks a player, for each other opponent, create a token that's a copy of Shredder tapped and attacking that player, except it isn't legendary. Sacrifice those tokens at end of combat.
Whenever Shredder deals combat damage to a player, that player loses half their life, rounded up.

tokens.name: Splinter, the Mentor
tokens.oracle_text:
Menace
Whenever Splinter or another nontoken creature you control leaves the battlefield, create a Mutagen token.
Partner—Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

tokens.name: Tower Winder
tokens.oracle_text:
Reach, deathtouch
When this creature enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Command Tower, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
tokens.flavor_text: The tower guards eventually gave up, figuring it was better at the job anyway.

tokens.set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
tokens.name: Treasure
tokens.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.
